overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG depicting a medieval castle interior with stone vaulting and wizard-robed characters. The clip begins with a stationary view of a great hall or kitchen area with NPCs moving about, then transitions to following a player character as they exit through a heavy wooden door into a sunlit corridor adorned with portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle kitchen or servants' hall with stone vaulting

events.description: robed NPC walks from right side of room toward the center tables
NPC enters from foreground and walks toward the back of the hall

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall interior from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near stone pillar, occasionally shifting position and looking around
walking across the room carrying an object toward the back tables

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed gothic vaulting and warm lantern light
thick cylindrical stone column supporting the ceiling arches
long wooden work table with metal pots and kitchen equipment
warm glowing lanterns suspended from chains on the ceiling
wooden shelving units stocked with supplies along the left wall

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a medieval castle kitchen or great hall with high stone vaulted ceilings and thick pillars. Several robed NPCs move about the space, with one standing near a left pillar and another walking across the center of the room. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone interior as various figures go about their activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with portrait paintings leading to bright exit

events.description: camera perspective switches to following a character exiting the great hall through a heavy wooden door
moving from dim interior hall into brighter corridor with sunlight visible at the far archway

agents.ego_description: character in black wizard robes with red collar lining walking through a doorway into a stone corridor

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and vertical signage reading 'HOUSE'
framed paintings in ornate frames hanging on the corridor walls
sunlit arched opening at the far end of the corridor
decorative patterned rug running down the center of the corridor floor

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a robed character exiting the great hall through a heavy wooden door into a narrower stone corridor. The walls are adorned with framed portraits and a decorative carpet lines the floor. The character walks toward a bright sunlit archway at the far end of the corridor, leaving the kitchen area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the dim, bustling interior of a castle hall into a bright, ornate corridor. It begins with a stationary view of a great hall featuring high stone vaulted ceilings and thick pillars, where robed NPCs move through the warm glow of lantern light. As the perspective shifts, the camera begins to follow a robed character who exits the hall through a heavy wooden door. The scene then opens into a narrower stone corridor lined with a decorative carpet and framed portraits on the walls. The movement continues forward, leaving the kitchen area behind as the character walks toward a bright, sunlit archway at the far end of the passage.
